name: pathology-report-checker
description: Analyzes surgical pathology cancer reports for compliance with CAP and ICCR guidelines. Validates pTNM staging (AJCC 8th edition), checks required-element completeness with severity-based scoring, generates synoptic templates, tumor-board summaries, SNOMED CT / ICD-O-3 codes, free-text→synoptic conversion, and amendments. Breast, colorectal, exocrine pancreas, gastric. English & Turkish.
